column1: Place over a friendly enemy to make them follow you
Points to the level exit trigger
Pushes any objects that enter it with the selected force
Put on an enemy to set their starting weapon. Set the team to the weapon name, set armed to 0 to make them unarmed
Put this on a Move Idle 1 enemy to make them face left
Scalable liquid with configurable damage. Only editable in background mode
Scalable liquid. Only editable in background mode
Sends an activation signal to all objects with the selected ID when an entity with the selected team enters it. Leave the team blank for all teams
Sets the target position of all doors with the selected Target ID to the selected position
Spawns a weapon. Set the name to your desired weapons name (case insensitive)
Spawns small crates. Set the X of the spawn time to your desired spawn cooldown
Spinning blade that damages anything that touches it
